title: Lack of Data Classification
description: Without defined data classification, sensitive information (e.g., PII, financial data) may be handled with insufficient security controls. This exposes the system to unauthorized access, disclosure, or theft of confidential data.
affected_component: All Data Storage and Processing Components
attack_vector: Unauthorized access to databases, misconfigured storage, or insecure data transmission.
mitigations: Implement a data classification scheme based on sensitivity levels.
Apply appropriate access controls based on data classification.
Encrypt sensitive data at rest and in transit.
